subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who turned towards Us when the divines and theologians of the earth turned away - to this beareth witness He Who hath spoken and speaketh still [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل اذ اعرض علماء الارض و فقهائها یشهد بذلک من نطق و ینطق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
